title: overgeared + epic knights compat
description: this datapack adds compatibility between mods overgeared and epic knights
body:
adds overgeared smithing recipes for epic knights armour, shields and weapons

removes the recipes for epic knights steel uses overgeared steel instead

if silver tin or bronze ingots are present adds recipes for weapons and shields made from those materials

JEI is recomended

all the weapon recipes use sword blueprints including spears, axes, halberds and warhammers




compat for antique legacy
https://modrinth.com/datapack/overgeared-+-epic-knights-antique-legacy-compat

compat for slavic armory
https://modrinth.com/datapack/overgeared-+-epic-knights-slavic-armory
